nameOfCommonIngredientsGlossary: (Chaenomeles Speciosa Fruit/Leaf/Root/Twig)/Crocus Sativus Flower/Cuscuta Chinensis Seed/Lilium Brownii Bulb/Lonicera Japonica Bud/(Morus Alba Fruit/Leaf/Root/Twig)/(Gastrodia Elata/Platycladus Orientalis/Rehmannia Glutinosa Tuber)/Scutellaria Barbata/Sesamum Indicum Seed/Vitis Vinifera Fruit Extract
chemicalDescription: This is the extract of the fruit, leaves, roots and twigs of Chaenomeles speciosa and Morus alba; the flowers of Crocus sativus; the seeds of Cuscuta chinensis, Scutellaria barbata and Sesamum indicum; the bulbs of Lilium brownii; the buds of Lonicera japonica; the tubers of Gastrodia elata, Platycladus orientalis and Rehmannia glutinosa; the whole plant, Scutellaria barbata and the fruit of Vitis vinifera.
inciName: (CHAENOMELES SPECIOSA FRUIT/LEAF/ROOT/TWIG)/CROCUS SATIVUS FLOWER/CUSCUTA CHINENSIS SEED/LILIUM BROWNII BULB/LONICERA JAPONICA BUD/(MORUS ALBA FRUIT/LEAF/ROOT/TWIG)/(GASTRODIA ELATA/PLATYCLADUS ORIENTALIS/REHMANNIA GLUTINOSA TUBER)/SCUTELLARIA BARBATA/SESAMUM INDICUM SEED/VITIS VINIFERA FRUIT EXTRACT
